name: Sunburst Lemon Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, mix all crust ingredients at low speed until crumbly. Press the mixture evenly into the bottom of an ungreased 13x9-inch pan.
3. Bake the crust for 20-30 minutes or until it is lightly golden brown.
4. Meanwhile, in another large bowl, combine all filling ingredients except lemon juice and blend well. Stir in the lemon juice.
5. Pour the filling over the warm crust.
6. Return to oven and bake an additional 25-30 minutes or until the top is lightly golden brown. Allow to cool completely.
7. In a small bowl, mix 1 cup confectioner's sugar with enough lemon juice for the desired spreading consistency; blend until smooth.
8. Spread over bars, then cut into bars. Makes 36 bars.
HIGH ALTITUDE (Above 3500 feet): No change.
